channel.title: STAT-103 Random Variables, Distributions & Sampling :: CS Two Year Refactor
channel.description: STAT-103 — Random Variables, Distributions & Sampling 1 credit (co-designed external) Working description (External/co-designed, stats dept. Distributions, sampling, central limit theorem.) Competency Assessments Evidence from STAT-103 enters the Crystalis record via LTI integration. Assessment type This pass Competencies evidenced Data Investigation Sampling investigation — design a sampling strategy, evaluate whether evidence supports a conclusion Investigate Questions with Data To develop Learning outcomes / competencies evidenced Week-by-week map (8 weeks) Signature/embedded assessments Threads passing through (with pass depth) Prerequisites and standalone-extractability (for service use)
